automation.ingram: Mailbox/archive source handling activated for Ingram report families; January-June archive files hashed, deduped, and imported where title identifiers resolved.
automation.kdp: Controlled upload route active. January-May KDP files retained as source evidence; June KDP remains UPLOAD REQUIRED.
automation.acx: Controlled upload route active. January-April ACX files retained as latest available source evidence; May/June are KNOWN UNAVAILABLE unless newer source is delivered.
automation.directSales: Controlled upload/no-activity route active. January Share & Sell source imported; June requires direct-sales upload or no-activity confirmation.
automation.kdpUpload: Controlled KDP upload route parses XLS/XLSX/CSV/TSV, records source totals, and dedupes by source hash. June source remains upload-required.
automation.acxUpload: Controlled ACX upload route parses multi-sheet XLS/XLSX workbooks, records source totals, and dedupes by source hash. Latest available archive source remains April.
automation.directSalesUpload: Controlled Direct Sales upload/no-activity route parses governed templates, records source totals, and dedupes by source hash.
